creator: g.veniamin@googlemail.com
text:
Chameleon Xcursors theme is a cursor set created primarily in Inkscape and
ImageMagick (for semitransparent and shadow).
Work on KDE and GNOME.
The cursors border color is negative of body color for high visibility.
(Small/Regular/Large version included)

Cursor themes:
anthracite
darkskyblue
pearl
skyblue
white
